lane_boundary.identity_strategy: Use operator-owned H1 alias account pattern only. Hermes may fill non-secret fields when safe, but operator handles password/email confirmation/OTP/CAPTCHA and any secret. Do not store aliases, passwords, cookies, tokens, API keys, or verification links in repo artifacts.

operator_gates: operator completes H1 alias account email confirmation/password/OTP/CAPTCHA if required
any API-token creation or inspection beyond metadata
operator final approval before report promotion or submission
